---
title: "Madeline Brandreth"
---

## Madeline Brandreth

**Dates:** (b.1843/4)

**Maiden name:** (Colvin), Lady

### Description

GFS worker

### Biography

She married (1866) Admiral Sir Thomas Brandreth (1825- 1894);  her address in PB 1914 is Heathfield, Winchester.

### Letters

- Letter from Jan 16 1900

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
